name: Italian Rice Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together rice, eggs, flour, 1/2 cup cheese, salt to taste, 1/4 teaspoon oregano, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, minced garlic, and parsley. Taste for seasoning.
2. Mix remaining ingredients (except oil) in a separate bowl.
3. Roll the rice mixture into small balls, about 1-1/4 inches in diameter.
4. Dip each ball in seasoned bread crumbs.
5. Heat approximately 1-1/2 inches of oil in an 8-inch or 10-inch skillet.
6. Fry the rice balls for about 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
